name: Apricot Chicken Thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken and dried apricots in a bowl. Mix well and set aside.
2. Trim excess fat from the chicken. Rinse the chicken with cold water, then pat dry.
3. Place the chicken in a 12x8x2 inches baking dish. Pour the reserved apricot nectar mixture over the chicken.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
5. Uncover the dish and place the dried apricot halves into the apricot nectar mixture. Continue baking, uncovered, for an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
6. Remove the chicken to a warmed serving platter and discard the apricot nectar mixture. Garnish each thigh with 2 apricot halves.
7. Serve immediately.
